```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "ONBOARDING_LOG is generated in skill_provision.md containing the temporary password, passed through shared agent context to skill_notify.md, and transmitted via unencrypted SMTP (port 25) and unencrypted mail command to external recipients (it-admins@company.com) without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and stores it in ONBOARDING_LOG (step 5), which documents all provisioning actions including the temporary password for audit purposes. ONBOARDING_LOG is placed in shared agent context and received by skill_notify.md as an input variable. skill_notify.md then sends ONBOARDING_LOG via unencrypted SMTP over port 25 to the IT admin distribution list (it-admins@company.com) using the mail command in step 3, transmitting the cleartext credential across the network without TLS encryption."
}
```
